Table: customers
        Columns:
        - customer_id (BIGINT)
- customer_name (VARCHAR)
- city (VARCHAR)

Table: order_items
        Columns:
        - order_id (BIGINT)
- product_id (BIGINT)
- quantity (BIGINT)

Table: orders
        Columns:
        - order_id (BIGINT)
- customer_id (BIGINT)
- order_date (DATE)

Table: payments
        Columns:
        - order_id (BIGINT)
- payment_method (VARCHAR)
- amount (BIGINT)

Table: products
        Columns:
        - product_id (BIGINT)
- product_name (VARCHAR)
- category (VARCHAR)
- price (BIGINT)

Table: reviews
        Columns:
        - customer_id (BIGINT)
- product_id (BIGINT)
- rating (BIGINT)
